name: Homeco Daily Needs Reit
analysis: EMAs are compressed, suggesting a big move is building. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$1.2530. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Trade setup: entry A$1.2530, stop A$1.1806, target A$1.3109. Risk/reward is 0.80:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
